title: Handle invalid enum dimensions
body:
Specifying and enum with an invalid dimension range results in an assert or segfault.

E.g. `enum [$] E { ... }`.

Use the `evaluate_ranges()` function to elaborate the enum dimensions. This functions has proper error checking and recovery built-in.

In addition verify that there is at most one packed dimension.

Also allow enums with lsb > msb for their base type. That already works just fine, but hits an assert that shouldn't be there.

Regression test for this PR: https://github.com/steveicarus/ivtest/pull/19
